uplink.description: Measurement frame: temperature and humidity (climate required pair)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame (header 0xA0 = ACW measurement, no timestamp). Blocks: 0x08 temp 0x0929=2345 -> 23.45 C; 0x09 hum 0x162E=5678 -> 56.78 %. expected.data authored from the upstream reference decoder (decodeur.js), which yields temperature0 23.45, humidity0 56.78.

uplink.description: Measurement frame with negative temperature (signed decode)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. 0x08 temp 0xFE0C=-500 -> -5.00 C (two's complement); 0x09 hum 0x1018=4120 -> 41.20 %. Upstream reference decoder yields temperature0 -5, humidity0 41.2.

uplink.description: Timestamped measurement frame (4-byte UNIX timestamp skipped)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame (header 0xE0 = ACW measurement with embedded timestamp). 4-byte horo 0x65000000 skipped; 0x08 temp 0x08FC=2300 -> 23.00 C; 0x09 hum 0x1B58=7000 -> 70.00 %. Upstream reference decoder yields temperature0 23, humidity0 70 plus a Horodatage string we omit.

uplink.description: Measurement frame with temperature sensor-error sentinel (warning)
uplink._note: Synthetic frame. 0x08 temp 0x8000 = -327.68 C, the upstream failed-read sentinel (rendered 'erreur' upstream) -> dropped + warned; 0x09 hum 0x162E=5678 -> 56.78 %. Upstream reference decoder yields temperature0 'erreur', humidity0 56.78.

uplink.description: Life (keep-alive) frame carrying node battery voltage
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame (header 0x81 = ACW life frame). tensionv 0x0E10=3600 mV -> 3.6 V (battery); tensionc 0x0C80=3200 mV (capacitor, not normalized). Upstream reference decoder yields tensionv 3.6 V, tensionc 3.2 V.

uplink.description: Unsupported legacy (old-product) frame returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic frame with byte0 high-nibble bit3 clear (0x42 -> old product). Upstream routes this through its legacy 'Ancien produit' path; we do not support those frames and report an error.
